sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الطَّعَامُ جُزْءًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنَ الْحَيَاةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Hrana se smatra osnovnim dijelom arapskog života.
sentences.translationEn: Food is considered an essential part of Arab life.

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَاتُ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ لِتَنَاوُلِ الْغَدَاءِ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Porodice se okupljaju petkom kako bi zajedno ručale.
sentences.translationEn: Families gather on Friday to have lunch together.

sentences.arabic: غَالِبًا مَا تُحَضِّرُ الْأُمَّهَاتُ أَطْبَاقًا تَقْلِيدِيَّةً مِثْلَ الْكَبْسَةِ أَوِ الْمَنْسَفِ.
sentences.translation: Majke često pripremaju tradicionalna jela poput kabse ili mansafa.
sentences.translationEn: Mothers often prepare traditional dishes such as Kabsa or Mansaf.

sentences.arabic: تَتَكَوَّنُ هَذِهِ الْوَجَبَاتُ مِنَ اللَّحْمِ وَالْأُرْزِ وَالْمُكَسَّرَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi obroci se sastoje od mesa, riže i orašastih plodova.
sentences.translationEn: These meals consist of meat, rice, and nuts.

sentences.arabic: الْأَكْلُ مَعًا يُقَوِّي الرَّوَابِطَ بَيْنَ أَفْرَادِ الْأُسْرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zajedničko jelo jača veze između članova porodice.
sentences.translationEn: Eating together strengthens the bonds between family members.
